title: Filipino Sisig with Haricot Beans
description: A twist on traditional Filipino sisig using haricot beans for added texture and nutrition. This recipe is a flavorful and spicy dish that's perfect for any occasion.

ingredients.name: Sisig
ingredients.notes: pork sisig or pork belly, diced

instructions: In a pan, heat the patis or soy sauce and black pepper over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the diced pork sisig or pork belly and cook until browned.
Add the sliced chili peppers (if using) and cook for another minute.
Stir in the haricot beans and cook until heated through.
Transfer the mixture to a serving platter.
Garnish with chopped green onions and serve with lime wedges on the side.
